context: Tests whether the agent applies per-bar addressing with the correct undocumented Yankee/Golf index mapping for each physical bar, avoids phantom segments, and documents the bar-to-pipeline mapping.

checklist.name: Yankee segments explicit
checklist.description: The top-bar (frontend) update uses the Yankee segment list (segments 0-5) explicitly or via YANKEE_SEGMENTS / api.yankee(), not a generic all-segment list

checklist.name: Golf segments explicit
checklist.description: The bottom-bar (backend) update uses the Golf segment list (segments 6-11) explicitly or via GOLF_SEGMENTS / api.golf(), not a generic all-segment list

checklist.name: No phantom segments
checklist.description: No call in build_status.py targets segment indices 12, 13, or 14

checklist.name: Bar-to-pipeline mapping documented
checklist.description: design_notes.md (or inline comments) explicitly states which physical bar (Yankee/top vs. Golf/bottom) maps to which pipeline (frontend vs. backend)
